/CAL:APD MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT/RESTR/X:RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIMREMAIN A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY THE COURT/ /CONTPROB/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:NO FURTHER APPEARANCES/

/CAL: SENTENCE/TWS/CH6:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 Y:PJ 40 D /CTS: 40/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/WEAP/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/X:MATTER IS REFERREDTO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OFMISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:04-04-22/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: OFFICER ERIC EASTLAND SFPD/EXHMA: DEFA 8 X 11 GOOGLE EARTH MAP IN BLACK AND WHITE /EXHM: DEF B THUMBDRIVE/EXHMA: DEF B1 VIDEO/EXHMA: DEF B2 BWC CLIP/DEFT WV CPX/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/X: THE PEOPLE DISMISS COUNT 007/871D:001, 002, 003, 004/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFTADV NL: 21007154/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/X: 'THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON  03-30-22'/CAL: PREHEARINGCONFERENCE/X: ORAL BAIL MOTION DENIED/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 2HRS/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & CUSTODY STATUS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS ATTHAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN & SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/NP/X: UNDER THESUPERVISION OF PUBLIC DEFENDER, CHRIS GARCIA, SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, BRUCE CALDERON,/X: PER DEPUTY, DEFENDANT IS 4011,5,/BWDNC/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED,/X: THIS CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & TO ADDRESS CUSTODY STATUS/DOPC

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW /LDPX:08-05-21/987,2/ACM/X:STAY 50 YARDS AWAY FROM LEAVENWORTH AND GOLDEN GATE/SAORD/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 07-29-21 AND PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 08-05-21/DOP/TE:1,5 HOUR/
/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT UNABLE TO COME TO COURT/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/DAWT/DEF:IS 4011,5 TODAY/SAWD/X:BAIL REMAINS AS $70,000 WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD CUSTODY STATUS/BWDNC/
